name: Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
h1: Ashley Furniture Industries's GCC footprint in India
lede: Ashley Furniture Industries runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Chennai, covering GCC/GIC, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ashley Furniture Industries office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
